description:
Advances: specled.spec_review.decisions_governance_inline

render_markdown (html.ex:2710) is plain Earmark; Obsidian-style [[id]] refs in ADR bodies render as literal double-bracket text (e.g. [[atlas.decision.expansion_rerank_deleted]] in atlas PR 62).

Fix: pre-process the ADR body before Earmark — [[id]] where id is in adrs_by_id links to that ADR's #adr-<slug> anchor; where id matches a subject, link to the subject anchor; otherwise render as a styled <code> ref. Must not fire inside fenced/inline code spans.
title: ADR markdown: resolve [[wiki-links]] to page anchors
